feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Consulta SQL AR e AP
entry.content: Olá preciso de uma consulta SQL SapB1 AR e AP. Posição dos títulos em aberto (PN, NF, Parcela)

entry.title: Inventory Revaluation with Inventory debit/credit type option
entry.content: My customer is using SAP B1  10.0 (FP2208) for HANA.  When we make Inventory Revaluation with 'Inventory debit/credit' option to change an manufactured item 's inventory value, it makes journal entry on the related account,  but it does not change the value in the Inventory audit report.   The price change option in revaluation can make journal entry and change the value  in the inventory audit report.  but the inventory debit/credit option does not.    Is this normal way of revaluation option function ?  or technical bug ?

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA - Catalina.out full of WARN/ERROR msgs
entry.content:
Hello all, we just discovered that the "catalina.out" log file handled by tomcat on the SAP HANA Server for SAP Business One have been growing slowly over a few months. Last week we discovered the log file was about 900GB. 

After cleaning this file and waiting for it to fill again with some data, we discovered that almost every second these errors are written in the file:

 

2024-12-02 07:47:47 ERROR [https-jsse-nio-40000-exec-52] com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler - not a valid token
io.jsonwebtoken.ExpiredJwtException: JWT expired at 2024-11-20T14:05:15Z. Current time: 2024-12-02T06:47:47Z, a difference of 1010552043 milliseconds.  Allowed clock skew: 0 milliseconds.
	at io.jsonwebtoken.impl.DefaultJwtParser.parse(DefaultJwtParser.java:427)
	at io.jsonwebtoken.impl.ImmutableJwtParser.parse(ImmutableJwtParser.java:148)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler.validateAccessToken(OAuth2Handler.java:174)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.handler.OAuth2Handler.validateAccessToken(OAuth2Handler.java:218)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.parseAndValidate(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:183)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.handleAuthorizationHeader(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:125)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.doFilter(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:67)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.internalDoFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:181)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.doFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:156)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardWrapperValve.invoke(StandardWrapperValve.java:168)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContextValve.invoke(StandardContextValve.java:90)
	at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.AuthenticatorBase.invoke(AuthenticatorBase.java:598)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardHostValve.invoke(StandardHostValve.java:130)
	at org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve.invoke(ErrorReportValve.java:93)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardEngineValve.invoke(StandardEngineValve.java:74)
	at org.apache.catalina.connector.CoyoteAdapter.service(CoyoteAdapter.java:342)
	at org.apache.coyote.http11.Http11Processor.service(Http11Processor.java:617)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProcessorLight.process(AbstractProcessorLight.java:63)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler.process(AbstractProtocol.java:934)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint$SocketProcessor.doRun(NioEndpoint.java:1698)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SocketProcessorBase.run(SocketProcessorBase.java:52)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1191)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:61)
	at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:838)
2024-12-02 07:48:01 WARN [https-jsse-nio-40000-exec-71] com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter - check authorization header error
com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.core.exception.B1SDKNotAuthenticatedException: invalid access token
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.parseAndValidate(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:185)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.handleAuthorizationHeader(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:125)
	at com.sap.b1.sdk.oidc.web.filter.OAuth2TokenFilter.doFilter(OAuth2TokenFilter.java:67)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.internalDoFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:181)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.ApplicationFilterChain.doFilter(ApplicationFilterChain.java:156)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardWrapperValve.invoke(StandardWrapperValve.java:168)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContextValve.invoke(StandardContextValve.java:90)
	at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.AuthenticatorBase.invoke(AuthenticatorBase.java:598)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardHostValve.invoke(StandardHostValve.java:130)
	at org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve.invoke(ErrorReportValve.java:93)
	at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardEngineValve.invoke(StandardEngineValve.java:74)
	at org.apache.catalina.connector.CoyoteAdapter.service(CoyoteAdapter.java:342)
	at org.apache.coyote.http11.Http11Processor.service(Http11Processor.java:617)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProcessorLight.process(AbstractProcessorLight.java:63)
	at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler.process(AbstractProtocol.java:934)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint$SocketProcessor.doRun(NioEndpoint.java:1698)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SocketProcessorBase.run(SocketProcessorBase.java:52)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1191)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659)
	at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:61)
	at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:838)

 

I was not able to find any documentation or SAP note about this subject. Given the fact that it is writting these ERROR/WARN every seconds, I would like to know if this is normal or not and if it's not normal, how to correct this issue? 

File location is here: /hana/usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/tomcat/logs

Since we discovered this, at the moment we "clean" this file using the following cmd every day with cron: 

cat /dev/null > /hana/usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/tomcat/logs/catalina.out

Thank you.

Best regards

entry.title: Denmark Localisation for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi All,

I hope you are well.

I would appreciate some clarification on the status of the Denmark Localisation for SAP Business One.

In the link attached below, you can find a list of registered bookkeeping systems that have been checked and registered by the Danish Business Authority. 

Directory of registered bookkeeping systems | The Business Guide

Apparently SAP Business One does not meets the new rules for digital bookkeeping.

Does anyone know what is the current situation?

Thank you,

Kinds regards,

Miguel Angel

entry.title: Finding B1 UI Field Labels for Database Fields Without Tedious Mapping
entry.content:
I need to map the SAP Business One database fields to their corresponding labels as they appear in the B1 client UI. For instance, in the Sales Quotation form, the field OQUT.CardCode is labeled as Customer in the UI.

I know I can use View > System Information to see this information, but with the number of fields across various tables, this approach feels a bit... overwhelming.

Is there a reference, document, or method to retrieve all these mappings in a more efficient way?

entry.title: A/p Down Payment Invoice & A/p Invoice Query
entry.content:
Hi

  I need query to get A/p Down Payment Invoice linked with A/p Invoice.

Thanks

entry.title: No matching records found 'Payment Terms' (OCTG) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
entry.content:
When print preview outgoing payment by account this error appear in sap b1

No matching records found 'Payment Terms' (OCTG) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]

entry.title: Account balance filter is not saved
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently we upgraded to SAP Business One 10.00.251 and users started to complain that SAP doesn't save a date filter in an 'Account Balance' form: 

Prevoiusly this filter remains with the last used values, and now after SAP reopening it resets to some initial values.

Could you please help on that? Thanks!

Thanks!

entry.title: Upgrade failed to FP2408 SAP B1 for HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We tried to upgrade to FP2408, SAP B1 for HANA. we are currently on FP2208. The upgrade failed on the below:


Has anyone experienced this error, and know a way to resolve it?

Thank you,
Jerusha

entry.title: "info backend-proxy-middleware /b1s/v1/$batch" loop and "No Data found"
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm experiencing an issue with the SAP Fiori tools extension pack. When I start the application, the terminal logs the same information repeatedly in an infinite loop, indicating that it is sending the same request to the service layer over and over again: 

info backend-proxy-middleware /b1s/v1/$batch

Interestingly, in the browser's Developer Tools, all the requests appear to be successful, and the responses contain the expected result body. However, despite these successful responses, the grid in the UI still displays "No Data Found."

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? What steps should I take to resolve this?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAP Business One Mobile application: approval for outgoing payments missing data
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am using SBO 10.0 version for SAP HANA(10.00.191), and SBO mobile application on both Android and iOS platforms.

I am encountering an issue where some records are not visible in the mobile application when checking approvals for outgoing payments, even though these records are accessible in the SBO desktop application.

 

For instance, users can view the "OutgoingPayment-L4" record on the desktop application but are unable to see it in the mobile app.

Could you please help me with this?

entry.title: Use of Account type option into Chart of account SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi team,

In the chart of accounts, account types there are three choices: Sales, Expenditure and Other.

what is main use of it? what happened if all chart of account in all drawer has selected Expenditure option ?

SAP B1 , SAP Business One, Account Type

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Item Master Data
entry.content: We have created a large quantity of new items in SAP which have not yet been used.   We have now decided that we need to change the item numbers.  Can I use the import from excel feature to amend the item numbers rather than do manually. I have tried this without success.

entry.title: SAP Business One API Authentication Service is continuously restarting
entry.content: I am facing an issue where the SAP Business One API Authentication Service is continuously restarting. Does anyone know what might be causing this behavior?

entry.title: UOM List in Item Master Data
entry.content:
Hi,

I setup UOMs but I dont know where the setting is so I can get the system to pull from the list.  I dont have the area in yellow, only the field.

The file is from a working system, but I need to get it setup in another system.

Can someone help with this?

Thanks

entry.title: PickListsService_UpdateReleasedAllocation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m facing an issue while working with SAP Business One Service Layer when trying to update bin allocations for child items in a Sales BOM.

Here’s the scenario:

  • I have a Sales Order with a mix of Sales BOM (parent items) and child items (inventory-managed).

  • I’m creating and updating PickLists using the Service Layer.

  • For parent items in the Sales BOM, bin allocations are not applicable as they are non-inventory items. However, for child items, I’m attempting to allocate bins.

Here’s what I’ve noticed:

  1. I’m using a JSON structure to update the PickLists, including the DocumentLinesBinAllocations array for child items.

  2. While some bins are successfully updated, a few child items fail to reflect the correct bin allocations.

  3. PreviouslyReleasedQuantity for all lines is correctly set, and I’ve verified the BinAbsEntry values exist and are active in the system.

Here’s an example of the update JSON I’m sending:

{
    "PickList": {
        "Absoluteentry": 107486,
        "ObjectType": "156",
        "PickListsLines": [
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 0,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 0,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 0,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 1,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 2,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 2,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 2,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 3,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 3,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 3,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 4,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 4,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 4,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 6,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 6,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            },
            {
                "AbsoluteEntry": 107486,
                "LineNumber": 5,
                "BaseObjectType": "17",
                "OrderEntry": 82541,
                "OrderRowID": 7,
                "ReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PreviouslyReleasedQuantity": 1,
                "PickStatus": "ps_Released",
                "PickedQuantity": 0,
                "DocumentLinesBinAllocations": [
                    {
                        "BinAbsEntry": 3,
                        "BaseLineNumber": 7,
                        "Quantity": 1,
                        "AllowNegativeQuantity": "tNO"
                    }
                ],
                "SerialNumbers": []
            }
        ],
        "Status": "ps_Released",
        "UseBaseUnits": "tNO"
    }
}

Despite this structure, the bin allocations fail for some child items. The LineNumber and BaseLineNumber mappings to the Sales Order lines have been double-checked and seem correct.

What I’ve Tried:

  1. Calling PickListsService_UpdateReleasedAllocation before sending the update JSON to ensure released quantities align.

  2. Adding and removing optional fields like AllowNegativeQuantity and SerialAndBatchNumbersBaseLine.

  3. Verifying the bin statuses and quantities in the OBIN table.

Questions:

  1. Has anyone encountered a similar issue where child items in a Sales BOM do not update correctly in picklists?

  2. Are there any specific configurations or prerequisites I should verify for child items in picklists?

  3. Could this be related to how the Service Layer processes Sales BOM structures or the relationship between parent and child items?

Any insights or advice would be greatly appreciated! 😊

Best regards,

entry.title: MRP - Forecast query
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are executing the MRP. While executing we have defined the forecast for the Item.
We want to generate requirement based on only Forecast and without considering the Sales Order and Blanket Agreement.

We have unchecked the Sales Order and Blanket Agreement from the wizard option but still the requirement is not generating.

Following is checked from our end.

1.We have also unchecked "Consumed Forecast" Option from General setting.
2. Items planning MRP related setting is already updated.
3. No stock available for item in warehouse.

 

Regards,

Krishna Verma

entry.title: Custom Tab
entry.content: I have created a custom tab in business partner master data.  This is visible for all users apart from two.  Why would this be the case please and how do we get it visible for these users?

entry.title: How to change Control Account in SAP Business One During Outgoing Payment based on AP Invoices
entry.content:
Dears,

Wish all have a good day

Please, help in this case

I was posted AP Invoices with Old Control Account on BP Master Data

After this i was changed Control Account to new control account in BP Master Data and make this old control account inactive

Issue is when make outgoing payment based on Old AP Invoices with old control account

i can't because old control account is inactive and if i converted old control account to active

Transactions of outgoing payment go to old control account and i want transactions go to new control account

 

Please, advice or workaround

Many Thanks

entry.title: web client sap b1 public view or Analysis for all user
entry.content:
How to public analysis view for all user?
Scenario, I have make 1 User define query in web client. I want all user or some one user can access
